{"tool":{"name":"auto_resolve","args":{"reply":"Hi! Thanks for reaching out. The 504 errors you're seeing are typically timeout issues during webhook delivery. Please refer to our **Webhook delivery troubleshooting guide (KB-101)** which covers common causes and solutions. Additionally, check **KB-203** for details on increasing webhook timeout in your dashboard settings. Webhooks are supported on all plans including free trials. Let us know if these resources don't resolve your issue!"}}}
